privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real forensic test data downloaded from the DFTT project (NTFS File Recovery Test Image) at /home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd. It requires creating an Autopsy ingest profile named 'Fast_Triage' and applying it to a new case named 'Backlog_Triage_2024' (case number 'INV-SOP-001'). The export_result.sh script verifies that the Fast_Triage profile exists globally, the case database was created, and that ONLY the expected fast modules (File Type ID, Hash Lookup, Extension Mismatch) executed, while verifying that heavy modules were successfully excluded. It also checks that an audit report is generated at /home/ga/Reports/profile_audit.txt.
